name: Apple-Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust by mixing margarine and cream cheese in a bowl. Add flour and salt, then mix with two knives or a pastry blender until crumbly.
2. Chill the dough for at least 30 minutes.
3. Divide the dough into two parts. Roll out one part on a lightly floured board and line a 9-inch or 10-inch pie pan with it. Roll out the remaining dough for the top crust and set aside (or pat it into the pan).
4. Prepare the filling: Peel, core, and slice apples.
5. Mix sugar, flour, and salt in a bowl.
6. Sprinkle the mixture over the apples in the pie pan.
7. Cover with flaked coconut (about 3-1/2 oz) and sprinkle with vanilla.
8. Dot the top layer with small pieces of margarine.
9. Place the top crust over the filling, making slits to allow steam to escape.
10. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 300°F and continue baking for an additional 35-40 minutes.
